_doc: Operator-edited team roster used by the Available Freight cockpit owner combobox. Each team's `userIds` are the dispatcher user IDs (matching `users.id` in the app DB) that belong to the team. `managerId` is optional and used to identify the manager whose direct reports define the 'My team' shortcut for callers that don't pass an explicit org chart. Teams without users still appear in the picker as a stable id; the cockpit treats them as empty selections.
